zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Carew於大約1291年出生在英國波克夏姆爾斯福德時，他的父親Nicholas Carew III28歲，母親Avice Martin32歲。他和Maude Malemaynes Pauncforte至少有1個兒子。他於1319年登記服兵役。他去世在英國素瑞貝丁頓。

zh-hans.Moulsford, Berkshire, England: 英国波克夏姆爾斯福德
zh-hans.Sandford, Devon, England: 英国英格兰戴文桑德福德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Carew于大约1291年出生在英国波克夏姆爾斯福德时，他的父亲Nicholas Carew III28岁，母亲Avice Martin32岁。他和Maude Malemaynes Pauncforte至少有1个儿子。他于1319年登记服兵役。他去世在英国素瑞貝丁頓。

nameMeanings.name: Carew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Aileen, James Patrick, Kieran.

Welsh (Pembrokeshire): habitational name from any of various minor places in Wales, in particular one near Pembroke with a major castle, named from Welsh caer ‘fort’ + rhiw ‘hill, slope’. The surname was taken to Ireland soon after the Norman invasion of England and was Gaelicized as de Carrún. In the 16th century a family called Carew from Devon played an important part in establishing the Tudor administration in Ireland.
Cornish (Somerset and Devon): from the cognate Cornish word kerrow (plural of ker ‘fort’), which occurs seven times as a placename in Cornwall.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Carew was born about 1291, in Moulsford, Berkshire, England, his father, Nicholas Carew III, was 28 and his mother, Avice Martin, was 32. He had at least 1 son with Maude Malemaynes Pauncforte. He registered for military service in 1319. He died in Beddington, Surrey, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Carew est né environ 1291, à Moulsford, Berkshire, Angleterre, son père, Nicholas Carew III, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Avice Martin, avait 32 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Maude Malemaynes Pauncforte. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1319. Il est décédé à Beddington, Surrey, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Carew um 1291 in Moulsford, Berkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicholas Carew III 28 und seine Mutter Avice Martin 32. Er hatte mit Maude Malemaynes Pauncforte mindestens 1 Sohn. Er hat sich 1319 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb in Beddington, Surrey, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Carew è nato il circa 1291 nel Moulsford, Berkshire, England, il suo padre, Nicholas Carew III, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Avice Martin, aveva 32 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Maude Malemaynes Pauncforte. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1319. Morì nel Beddington, Surrey, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Carewが約1291年にイギリスバークシュアイアモウルスフォードで生まれた時，父Nicholas Carew IIIは28歳，母Avice Martinは32歳であった。彼はMaude Malemaynes Pauncforteとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1319年に兵役登録をした。彼はイギリススリーベッドイントンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Carew(이)가 대략 1291년 영국 버크실르 모우스퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas Carew III(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Avice Martin(은)는 32세였다. 그는 Maude Malemaynes Pauncforte(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1319년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 영국 수리 베딩턴에서 사망했다.

mn.Sandford, Devon, England: Sandford, Devon, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Carew nasceu aproximadamente 1291, em Moulsford, Berkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Nicholas Carew III, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Avice Martin, tinha 32 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Maude Malemaynes Pauncforte. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1319. Ele faleceu em Beddington, Surrey, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Carew родился около 1291 г. в местности моулсфорд, биркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Nicholas Carew III было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Avice Martin, 32. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Maude Malemaynes Pauncforte. В 1319 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер в местности беддингтон, сурри, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Carew nació aproximadamente 1291, en Moulsford, Berkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Nicholas Carew III, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Avice Martin, tenía 32 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Maude Malemaynes Pauncforte. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1319. Murió en Beddington, Surrey, Inglaterra.
